svg.aria-label: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder, homelabber, dad-joke connoisseur. Refreshes every 6 hours with live weather, live GitHub stats, and a rotating dad joke.
svg.title: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder, homelabber, dad-joke connoisseur. Refreshes every 6 hours with live weather, live GitHub stats, and a rotating dad joke.
svg.desc:
william@dev:~$ cat /etc/motd WILLIAM'S DEV TERMINAL v2026.05 Security • AI/ML • Homelab • Dad Jokes Sunny 78°F | Humidity: 40% william@dev:~$ neofetch --ascii_distro dev-machine william@dev-machine OS: DadOS LTS (Linux + Coffee) Shell: /bin/dad-jokes Uptime: 20+ years (one continuous session) Role: Security Engineer • Multi-Agent AI • Homelabber Location: southern PA, basement-datacenter Languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust Editor: nvim
● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● william@dev:~$ status --me
✓ nexus-agents online · 15 models ✓ homelab BOSH + CF healthy ✓ vuln-bot briefing shipped ⚠ coffee refill required ✓ dad-joke buffer overflowing
william@dev:~$ uptime --emotional built with care (and caffeine) william@dev:~$ ./dad-joke --random --format=fancy DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 28 Category: KERNEL Q: How does a sysadmin propose? A: With a ring0. william@dev:~$ gh api users/williamzujkowski --jq '.public_repos,.followers' GITHUB: @williamzujkowski Repos: 88 Followers: 25 Following: 51 Gists: 134 Member since: Sep 2015 william@dev:~$ cat /etc/goodbye.txt Thanks for visiting! May your: - Code compile without warnings - Tests pass on first try - Bugs be easily reproducible - Coffee stay hot - Git conflicts be minimal See you in the commits!

g.text: ║ DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 28 ║
║ Q: How does a sysadmin propose? ║
